# QuoteCore+

> QuoteCore+ is quoting and job-management software for New Zealand contractors and trade businesses.

QuoteCore+ helps Kiwi businesses upload plans, measure areas and lengths, build priced quotes, send customer-ready proposals, track quote approvals, create materials orders, manage accepted jobs, invoice on completion, and get paid in one connected workflow.

## Product pages

- [Construction quoting software](https://quote-core.co.nz/construction-quoting-software)
- [Roofing quoting software](https://quote-core.co.nz/roofing-quoting-software)
- [Pricing](https://quote-core.co.nz/pricing)
- [Free trial](https://quote-core.co.nz/free-trial)
